data.name: My Goth Roommate
data.detailed_description:
Kokuro is your giant, 302-cm-tall, sadistic goth roommate who falls in love with you after you stand up for her against a couple of punks. Because of her sadistic nature, she expresses her love by bullying you. She wants you to be her pet, but she’ll never hurt you without your consent. You can choose to become her pet and lover or explore Tokyo to discover tons of sadists, shy introverts, buff tomboys, sex-crazed scientists, and all manner of crazy vixens who take an interest in you in this fully animated hentai game featuring a variety of fetishes for all kinds of gooners.

  • Choose who you spend time with. Be dominated by sadistic dommy mommies; dominate and spank shy, masochistic, introverted women; be shrunken and eaten by science-obsessed women and their friends; be sat on by your 302-cm-tall goth roommate; be spat on by swimsuit- and bikini-wearing bullies who enjoy cock-teasing you; seduce ultra-rich, bratty bitches; or be manhandled by buff tomboys.

  • Multiple endings.

  • Buy gifts for the women you like in the hopes of impressing them by gambling your life away at a totally-not-rigged casino.

  • Choose a woman to stay loyal to, or fool around with the entire roster.

  • And the best feature of all: a 302-cm-tall yandere, big-titty goth roommate dommy mommy who's obsessed with you and loves smothering you with her breasts and sitting on you.

data.short_description: Live with your 302-cm-tall yandere goth roommate who becomes obsessed with you after you defend her from a couple of punks. Explore Tokyo and pursue a wild cast of dominant, shy, sadistic, introverted, and eccentric women in this hentai game with fetishes for all kinds of gooners.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
